summary: Accounting System Testing Complete - All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend dashboard loads with all 8 tabs (Overview, PRC Mint, PRC Burn, Liability, Reserve Fund, Daily Summary, User Analysis, Settings) working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Master Dashboard API correctly returns overview, prc_supply, liability, financials, risk, alerts, and wallets sections
PRC Mint Ledger correctly tracks all inflow transaction types (mining, tap_game, referral, cashback, admin_credit, etc.)
PRC Burn Ledger correctly tracks all outflow transaction types (order, withdrawal, prc_burn, bill_payment_request, etc.)
Liability Ledger includes ageing analysis (0-7 days safe, 8-30 days warning, 31+ days critical)
Reserve Fund management includes auto-allocation percentage and backing ratio calculation
Conversion Rate management maintains history of rate changes
Daily Summary generation calculates risk score (0-100) based on backing ratio, revenue/expense ratio, burn/mint ratio
User Cost Analysis identifies loss-making users by comparing PRC earned vs spent
180-day inactive user PRC burn feature is implemented and accessible via API
All accounting settings are configurable: prc_per_inr, reserve_fund_percentage, inactive_expiry_days, liability thresholds

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 8 tabs load correctly with proper data display)

seed_data_creation: Reserve fund wallet created automatically if not exists. Test added ₹100 to reserve fund during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accounting System fully tested. Route is /admin/accounting. The dashboard has 8 tabs: Overview (key metrics, risk score, company wallets), PRC Mint (inflow ledger), PRC Burn (outflow ledger), Liability (INR redemptions with ageing), Reserve Fund (management with auto-allocation), Daily Summary (system summaries with trends), User Analysis (loss-making users), Settings (conversion rate, reserve %, expiry days, thresholds). All APIs are under /api/admin/accounting/*. Test file /app/tests/test_accounting_system.py covers all CRUD operations.

TestMasterDashboard.test_get_master_dashboard: PASSED - Returns overview, prc_supply, liability, financials, risk, alerts, wallets

TestPRCMintLedger.test_get_prc_mint_ledger: PASSED - Returns entries, pagination, summary with total_minted and by_source
TestPRCMintLedger.test_prc_mint_ledger_with_filters: PASSED - Source type filter works correctly

TestPRCBurnLedger.test_get_prc_burn_ledger: PASSED - Returns entries, pagination, summary with total_burned and by_use_type

TestReserveFund.test_get_reserve_fund: PASSED - Returns balance, percentage, total_liability_inr, backing_ratio, status, history
TestReserveFund.test_add_to_reserve_fund: PASSED - Successfully adds funds and persists

TestConversionRate.test_update_conversion_rate: PASSED - Updates rate and maintains history

TestDailySummary.test_generate_daily_summary: PASSED - Generates summary with risk_score and risk_status

TestUserCostAnalysis.test_get_user_cost_analysis: PASSED - Returns users with earned/spent/net_cost and summary

TestAccountingSettings.test_get_accounting_settings: PASSED - Returns all settings with defaults

AdminAccountingDashboard.overview_tab: PASSED - Shows Risk Score (0/100 CRITICAL), Circulating PRC, INR Liability, Backing Ratio, PRC Supply Overview, Monthly Financials, Company Wallets, User Overview
AdminAccountingDashboard.prc_mint_tab: PASSED - Shows Total Minted, source breakdown, transaction table with Date, User, Source, PRC Amount, Description
AdminAccountingDashboard.prc_burn_tab: PASSED - Shows Total Burned, use type breakdown, transaction table with Date, User, Use Type, PRC Amount, Description
AdminAccountingDashboard.liability_tab: PASSED - Shows Total INR Liability, INR Paid, INR Pending, Conversion Rate, Liability Ageing (0-7d Safe, 8-30d Warning, 31+d Critical)
AdminAccountingDashboard.reserve_fund_tab: PASSED - Shows Reserve Balance, Total Liability, Backing Ratio, Status, Auto Allocation info, Recent Activity, Add to Reserve Fund button
AdminAccountingDashboard.daily_summary_tab: PASSED - Shows table with Date, Active Users, PRC Minted, PRC Burned, Revenue, Expense, Net P&L, Risk, Generate Today's Summary button
AdminAccountingDashboard.user_analysis_tab: PASSED - Shows Total PRC Distributed, Total PRC Redeemed, Net System Cost, user table with Membership, PRC Earned, PRC Spent, Net Cost, Status (LOSS/PROFIT), Burn Inactive User PRC button
AdminAccountingDashboard.settings_tab: PASSED - Shows Conversion Rate, Reserve Fund Allocation, PRC Expiry for Inactive Users, Alert Thresholds with Update buttons

AdminLayout_Sidebar.accounting_menu: PASSED - Accounting Dashboard link present under Finance group in sidebar

observations.risk_status: System shows CRITICAL risk status with 0/100 score due to backing ratio (0.0329x) being below 1.0x target
observations.negative_circulating_prc: Circulating PRC is negative (-26,468.76) because total burned (31,785.16) exceeds total minted (5,316.40)
observations.alerts_working: Alert system correctly shows 'PRC Backing Ratio below 1.0' and 'Liability exceeds 3x monthly revenue' warnings
